scripts.fix:manifest: node fix-manifest.cjs && node fix-strings.cjs && node clean-main-activity.cjs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android --target=emulator
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node fix-manifest.cjs && node fix-strings.cjs && node clean-main-activity.cjs && cd android && chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew clean && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && node fix-manifest.cjs && node fix-strings.cjs && node clean-main-activity.cjs && cd android && chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew clean && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.rebuild:android: rm -rf android && npm run build && npx cap add android && node fix-manifest.cjs && node fix-strings.cjs && node clean-main-activity.cjs && cd android && chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew assembleDebug
